Chill Remote I used to watch a lot of content on my monitor, but it is not a smart display and
it has no remote. So I would plug in my…

frontmatter.title: Chill Remote
frontmatter.description: A web app and browser extension that turn my phone into a remote for whatever is playing on my screen, so I can seek, play, and pause from the couch.
frontmatter.bannercaption: Your phone as a remote for Netflix, Prime, and YouTube
